recommendations: Remove the 'model_list' table from the query plan to ensure minimal retrieval and structural efficiency.

adjustments: Remove the 'model_list' table from the query plan.

final_sql:
SELECT c.CountryId, c.CountryName
FROM countries c
JOIN car_makers cm ON c.CountryId = cm.Country
WHERE cm.Id IN (
    SELECT cm.Id
    FROM car_makers cm
    JOIN countries c ON cm.Country = c.CountryId
    GROUP BY cm.Id
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT cm.Maker) > 3
)
UNION
SELECT c.CountryId, c.CountryName
FROM countries c
JOIN car_makers cm ON c.CountryId = cm.Country
JOIN car_names cn ON cm.Id = cn.MakeId
WHERE cn.Make = 'Fiat';
